project_name: ÉTHERA - Cinematic Luxury Perfume Landing Page
general_ui_ux_guidelines: Continuous cinematic journey: Never make the user feel like they are jumping between separate blocks. Use soft blurred transitions or intersecting scroll-triggers.
Generous Whitespace (Macro-spacing): Use p-24, p-32 to give elements breathing room. The hero must be fully immersive (100vh).
Minimal Copy: Rely on visual storytelling. Hide secondary information behind subtle hover states or quick-views.
Premium Hover States: Never snap. Use slow 0.4s to 0.6s ease-in-out transitions. Add soft glows (using accent gold) and slight upward lifts (-translate-y-2).
Data Test IDs: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

rules: Headings must use tight tracking (tracking-tighter) and be massive (text-5xl to text-7xl for hero).
Use italicized editorial accents for single words inside headings (e.g., 'Every Drop Tells a Story').
Body text must be highly readable, tracking-wide for overlines/subtitles.
Never use Cormorant Garamond for tiny utility text. Use Inter uppercase with wide letter-spacing.
Base background must be #0A0A0A. Use the burgundy variants (#2B0810, #4A0D16) as massive radial gradients (blob backgrounds) to create an ambient cinematic glow.
Accent Gold (#C8A46B) should be used for thin lines (1px), subtle glowing text, and magnetic CTA borders.
Text Light (#F6F2EA) is the primary text color. Dim it to 60% opacity for secondary body text.
Do not use solid gold buttons. Use glass buttons with a 1px gold border and a subtle gold inner glow on hover.
CRITICAL: Do not use complete transparent background in header or overlays where text visibility is compromised. Always use glassmorphism with blur and a tint of background.

effects: Floating gold dust: Use a subtle particle system (via Framer Motion or lightweight Canvas) in the Hero and 3D section.
Fog/smoke overlays: Use slow CSS keyframe animations of radial gradients to simulate fog.
Glass reflections: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(200, 164, 107, 0.15).
Grain texture: Add a fixed full-screen SVG noise overlay at 2% to 4% opacity to kill the 'digital' feel.

component_instructions.loader: Premium Loader: 100vh dark bg, animated golden line drawing the logo, fading out with a blur.
component_instructions.navbar: Transparent Navbar: Glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-md, bg-black/40). Never fully transparent on content. Magnetic CTA button. Links use underline expand on hover.
component_instructions.hero: Hero Section: 100vh, matte black rotating podium, floating particles. Center headline 'Every Drop Tells a Story.' (story italicized). Watch Craftsmanship CTA uses smooth scroll to section.
component_instructions.fragrance_story: Split-screen editorial. Use framer-motion or GSAP ScrollTrigger for word-by-word opacity reveal. Slow bg radial gradient transition.
component_instructions.fragrance_notes: 3 floating glass cards (Top, Heart, Base). Hover triggers lift, inner gold glow, and glass reflection sweep.
component_instructions.collection: 4 featured perfumes in an asymmetric bento or staggered grid. Premium card styling, hover shadow/motion. Quick-view minimal modal.
component_instructions.3d_experience: Canvas filling 80vh. Interactive 3D bottle (R3F) or mouse-move 2.5D parallax fallback.
component_instructions.craftsmanship: Scroll-based storytelling timeline. A vertical golden progress line connects stages (Selection, Composition, Design, Finishing). Background fades between cinematic images.
component_instructions.ingredients: Editorial floating grid of images (Bergamot, Jasmine, Sandalwood) moving at different parallax speeds.
component_instructions.testimonials: Minimal luxury cards. Fade-in on scroll with soft glass borders.
component_instructions.newsletter: Visual-only large editorial block. Minimal email field (border-bottom only), gold text button.

layouts.grid_system: Asymmetrical grids (col-span-full md:col-span-8, etc.). Never fill 100% symmetrically. Use generous gap-12 to gap-24.
layouts.spacing: Mobile-first padding. Sections must have min-h-screen to allow immersive storytelling.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment. Text often left-aligned against right-aligned heavy imagery to create tension.

motion.scroll_animations: Use smooth scrolling globally (e.g., Lenis). Elements should fade and translate up slightly on scroll.
motion.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons, slow border color shifts, image scale inside overflow-hidden wrappers on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #F6F2EA text on #0A0A0A or #2B0810 background meets APCA/WCAG standards.
accessibility.focus_states: Use an elegant gold ring (ring-1 ring-[#C8A46B] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#0A0A0A]) for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.aria: Add aria-hidden='true' to decorative particle effects and background layers.

hero_fallback.description: Clear glass perfume bottle on black background

collection_2.description: Luxury perfume bottle resting on textured fabric

collection_3.description: Luxurious perfume bottle displayed on rustic wood

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Share the guideline implementation for .js/.jsx files (not .tsx) as the repository is JavaScript based.
Do NOT use standard Vercel/SaaS template styles. This is an Awwwards-winning cinematic site.
Do NOT center-align everything. Use asymmetry.
Avoid pure black (#000000) for large text; use #F6F2EA. Avoid pure white backgrounds.
All buttons must be animated using framer-motion (scale on hover/tap) and have data-testid attributes.
Use lucide-react for minimal, thin-stroke icons.
Ensure all gradients blend smoothly with #0A0A0A (the base page color).
Implement a global noise overlay using a fixed, pointer-events-none div with an SVG grain background.
